name: issues
context: Create, search, label, and manage GitHub issues programmatically
info: This skill covers the full issue lifecycle on GitHub: creating issues with titles, bodies, labels, and assignees; searching and filtering issues with GitHub's query syntax; managing labels and milestones for triage and project tracking; and using issue templates for consistent reporting. All operations use the GitHub REST API via @octokit/rest. Agents use this skill to file bug reports, create feature requests, triage incoming issues, and track project progress. See [[github/auth]] for authentication and [[github/repos]] for repository context.

sections.title: Creating issues
sections.body: Use `octokit.issues.create()` with `owner`, `repo`, `title`, and `body`. Optionally set `labels`, `assignees`, and `milestone`. The response includes `number` (issue ID), `html_url`, and `state`. Markdown is supported in the body. See [[github/auth]] for token setup.

sections.title: Searching and filtering
sections.body: Use `octokit.search.issuesAndPullRequests()` with GitHub query syntax: `is:issue`, `is:open`, `label:bug`, `author:user`, `sort:created`. For repo-scoped listing, use `octokit.issues.listForRepo()` with `state`, `labels`, `sort`, and `direction` parameters. Pagination via `per_page` and `page`.

sections.title: Labels and milestones
sections.body: Create labels with `octokit.issues.createLabel()` specifying `name`, `color`, and `description`. Add labels to issues with `octokit.issues.addLabels()`. Create milestones with `octokit.issues.createMilestone()` and assign issues via `octokit.issues.update()`. Labels and milestones enable triage, prioritization, and release tracking.

sections.title: Issue templates
sections.body: Define YAML-based templates in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` for consistent issue creation. Templates can include required fields, dropdowns, and checkboxes. Use `config.yml` in the same directory to configure external links and blank issue permissions. Templates ensure all necessary context is captured when issues are filed.
